title: asclepias oreophila
intro: Asclepias oreophila is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America, belonging to the milkweed family (Apocynaceae). The plant contains cardioactive glycosides, which have been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to their potential to stimulate heart activity and treat various cardiovascular conditions. The medicinal properties of Asclepias oreophila have been associated with health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, improving circulation, and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and extracts, have been used in folk medicine to treat conditions like palpitations, arrhythmias, and congestive heart failure.
